en: On the third new moon after the people of Israel had gone out of the land of Egypt, on that day they came into the wilderness of Sinai.
zh: 以色列人從埃及地出來以後，滿了三個月的那一天，就來到西奈的曠野。

en: They set out from Rephidim and came into the wilderness of Sinai, and they encamped in the wilderness. There Israel encamped before the mountain,
zh: 他們從利非訂起行，來到西奈的曠野，就在曠野安營；以色列人在那座山前安了營。

en: while Moses went up to God. The LORD called to him out of the mountain, saying, "Thus you shall say to the house of Jacob, and tell the people of Israel:
zh: 摩西上到 神那裡去，耶和華從山上呼喚他，說：“你要這樣告訴雅各家，吩咐以色列人說：

en: You yourselves have seen what I did to the Egyptians, and how I bore you on eagles' wings and brought you to myself.
zh: ‘我向埃及人所行的，你們都看見了；也看見了我怎樣像鷹一樣把你們背在翅膀上，帶領你們到我這裡來。

en: Now therefore, if you will indeed obey my voice and keep my covenant, you shall be my treasured possession among all peoples, for all the earth is mine;
zh: 現在你們若是實在聽我的話，遵守我的約，你們就必在萬民中作屬我的產業，因為全地都是我的。

en: and you shall be to me a kingdom of priests and a holy nation. These are the words that you shall speak to the people of Israel."
zh: 你們要歸我作君尊的祭司和聖潔的國民。’這些話你都要對以色列人說。”

en: So Moses came and called the elders of the people and set before them all these words that the LORD had commanded him.
zh: 摩西去把人民的長老召了來，把耶和華吩咐他的這一切話都擺在他們面前。

en: All the people answered together and said, "All that the LORD has spoken we will do." And Moses reported the words of the people to the LORD.
zh: 人民都一致地回答，說：“凡是耶和華吩咐的，我們都要遵行。”摩西就去把人民的話回覆耶和華。

en: And the LORD said to Moses. "Behold, I am coming to you in a thick cloud, that the people may hear when I speak with you, and may also believe you forever." When Moses told the words of the people to the LORD,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“看哪，我要在密雲中降臨到你那裡，為要使人民在我與你說話的時候可以聽見，也可以永遠信你。”於是，摩西把人民的話告訴了耶和華。

en: the LORD said to Moses, "Go to the people and consecrate them today and tomorrow, and let them wash their garments
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你到人民那裡去，要他們今天明天分別為聖，又要他們洗淨自己的衣服；

en: and be ready for the third day. For on the third day the LORD will come down on Mount Sinai in the sight of all the people.
zh: 第三天，他們要準備好了，因為第三天耶和華要在全體人民眼前降臨在西奈山。

en: And you shall set limits for the people all around, saying, 'Take care not to go up into the mountain or touch the edge of it. Whoever touches the mountain shall be put to death.
zh: 你要在山的周圍給人民定界限，說：‘你們要謹慎，不可上山來，也不可觸摸山腳；凡是觸摸著那山的，必要把他處死。

en: No hand shall touch him, but he shall be stoned or shot; whether beast or man, he shall not live.' When the trumpet sounds a long blast, they shall come up to the mountain."
zh: 不可用手觸摸他，必須用石頭把他打死，或用箭射透；無論是牲畜，是人，都不得生存。’當號角聲拖長的時候，你們才可以上到山上來。”

en: So Moses went down from the mountain to the people and consecrated the people; and they washed their garments.
zh: 摩西從山上下來到人民那裡去，使人民分別為聖，他們就把自己的衣服洗淨了。

en: And he said to the people, "Be ready for the third day; do not go near a woman."
zh: 他對人民說：“第三天，你們要預備好了；不可親近女人。”

en: On the morning of the third day there were thunders and lightnings and a thick cloud on the mountain and a very loud trumpet blast, so that all the people in the camp trembled.
zh: 到了第三天早晨的時候，山上有雷聲、閃電和密雲，並且角聲非常強大，以致所有在營中的人民都顫抖。

en: Then Moses brought the people out of the camp to meet God, and they took their stand at the foot of the mountain.
zh: 摩西率領人民出營去迎接 神，他們都站在山下。

en: Now Mount Sinai was wrapped in smoke because the LORD had descended on it in fire. The smoke of it went up like the smoke of a kiln, and the whole mountain trembled greatly.
zh: 西奈全山冒煙，因為耶和華在火中降臨到山上；山的煙向上升，好像火窯的煙一樣。全山猛烈震動。

en: And as the sound of the trumpet grew louder and louder, Moses spoke, and God answered him in thunder.
zh: 角聲越來越大，大到極點的時候，摩西就說話， 神用雷聲回答摩西。

en: The LORD came down on Mount Sinai, to the top of the mountain. And the LORD called Moses to the top of the mountain, and Moses went up.
zh: 耶和華降臨在西奈山上，就是降臨到山頂上；耶和華呼召摩西上山頂，他就上去了。

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "Go down and warn the people, lest they break through to the LORD to look and many of them perish.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你下去警告人民，不可闖過來，到我這裡觀看，免得他們中間有很多人滅亡。

en: Also let the priests who come near to the LORD consecrate themselves, lest the LORD break out against them."
zh: 又叫那些親近耶和華的祭司分別為聖，恐怕耶和華忽然擊殺他們。”

en: And Moses said to the LORD, "The people cannot come up to Mount Sinai, for you yourself warned us, saying, 'Set limits around the mountain and consecrate it.'"
zh: 摩西對耶和華說：“人民不能上西奈山，因為你曾經警告我們，說：‘要給山定界限，也要把山分別為聖。’”

en: And the LORD said to him, "Go down, and come up bringing Aaron with you. But do not let the priests and the people break through to come up to the LORD, lest he break out against them."
zh: 耶和華對他說：“下去吧，你要和亞倫一起再上來，只是祭司和人民都不可闖過來，上到我這裡，恐怕我忽然擊殺他們。”

en: So Moses went down to the people and told them.
zh: 於是，摩西下到人民那裡告訴他們。
